name: Hecos Flows
description: Visual flow orchestration engine. Build multi-step automated pipelines with logic, scheduling, and data-passing between modules. Create via voice/text (NLP compiler), node-graph canvas, or YAML editor.
routing_instructions: FLOWS ORCHESTRATION: When the user wants to create a recurring automation, schedule tasks, or chain multiple actions together (e.g. 'every morning do X then Y then Z'), use the Flows engine. Call FLOWS__create_flow_from_nlp with the user's description to compile it into an executable pipeline.

commands.list_flows: List all saved flows with their status and trigger.
commands.get_flow: Get the YAML definition of a specific flow by ID.
commands.create_flow_from_nlp: Compile a natural-language description into a YAML flow and save it.
commands.run_flow: Immediately execute a flow by ID.
commands.enable_flow: Enable a flow (will be triggered by its scheduler).
commands.disable_flow: Disable a flow without deleting it.
commands.get_action_catalog: List all registered actions available for use in flows.

function.name: FLOWS__list_flows
function.description: Returns a list of all saved flows with their ID, name, trigger, enabled state, and last run time.

function.name: FLOWS__create_flow_from_nlp
function.description: Accepts a natural-language description of what the user wants to automate and compiles it into a structured YAML flow using the LLM. Returns the flow YAML and a summary card.

description.description: A plain-language description of the desired automation (e.g. 'every morning at 7 wake me up, read news summaries, and send a WhatsApp to my partner').

flow_name.description: Optional short name for the flow. If omitted, the LLM will suggest one.

function.name: FLOWS__run_flow
function.description: Immediately executes a saved flow by its ID, regardless of its scheduled trigger.

function.name: FLOWS__enable_flow
function.description: Enables a flow so its scheduler trigger becomes active.

function.name: FLOWS__disable_flow
function.description: Disables a flow so it won't run on its scheduled trigger.

function.name: FLOWS__delete_flow
function.description: Permanently deletes a flow and removes it from the scheduler.

function.name: FLOWS__get_action_catalog
function.description: Returns the full catalog of all available flow actions (from all registered Hecos modules), categorized by type.
